# Sprint 1 Retrospective

Date:
July 31, 2026

Sprint:
Sprint 1

---

# What Went Well

- Created project structure before coding
- Learned Git workflow
- Completed documentation faster than expected

---

# What Did Not Go Well

- Spent too much time researching Flutter tutorials
- Jira setup took longer than expected
- Underestimated time needed for documentation

---

# What I Learned

- Need smaller Jira tasks
- Should define acceptance criteria earlier
- Need to separate learning time from development time

---

# Action Items

For Sprint 2:

- Limit Jira configuration work
- Create technical decisions before coding
- Time-box research sessions
